rows.label: qev035605_MSG0001
rows.name:
Earthling... Are you allied with these Bias...
with the Growth, too!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035605_MSG0003
rows.name:
Dammit! If only my injuries were healed,
I'd chase these guys out of this land...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035605_MSG0002
rows.name:
I won't believe the words of guys
who sold their souls to the Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035605_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's true that this woman doesn't seem to be lying.
I could tell that much just from talking to her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035605_MSG0006
rows.name:
No matter the circumstances...
I have no intention of ever forgiving the guys
who killed my comrades.[ST:wait ]
